name: Scramblers Golf Club - Mount Pleasant
address: 557 Belle Station Blvd, Mt Pleasant, SC 29464
about: Scramblers Golf Club is a collection of private member-only golf simulation venues focused on game improvement, access, and community. The clubs feature 24/7 access to simulator bays for practice using live swing data or playing rounds on over 100 virtual courses, including 13 mini-games, peer-to-peer play, and special events. Members can utilize best-in-class technology, including AI trainers, swing cameras, and Uneekor launch monitors for detailed data analysis to improve their game. The venues operate with a membership-based model, designed for affordability and convenience, with locations in the Charleston, SC area and Florida.
why_golfers_like_it: Best-in-class technology with detailed swing data
Private member-only community with events and leagues

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring in their own food. Please be respectful of others and clean up after yourself.
Members are allowed to bring in their own drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-class camera IR-based technology with patented ball and Refine technology for instant spin and club path analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The provided context does not specify whether rental clubs are available. It is recommended that you bring your own clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a private club, you are allowed to bring in your own food and drinks. Please be respectful of others and clean up after yourself.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The context does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. Booking your 'Tee Time' ahead is highly recommended, but the duration will depend on the number of players and the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. Members can bring children and guests, and the environment is welcoming for families to practice and play together.
